creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> > Care to provide a patch?
> 
> For what do you need a patch?

You know, the patch to the port, to update it for a new version?

> You have to remove the new line in portsentry.c in line 1584.

> The rest compiles without any problems.

And does it run fine, too? I hesitate to update a port I haven't tested
myself.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Thank God we're theoretical physicists so we don't have to get our
hands dirty with particle accelerators and other heavy machinery.
